name: Jinal G.
headline: Admin Assistant | Office Coordination | MS Office | Documentation & Support

I’m organized, reliable, and comfortable working with MS Office, Google Workspace, and CRM systems. I enjoy creating structure, maintaining accuracy, and helping teams run smoothly.

Currently seeking opportunities as an Admin Assistant, Office Coordinator, or Administrative Support Executive in Dubai.

Open to learning, growing, and contributing to a professional work environment.

name: Nishitt Kanya
headline: R K Enterprise Trading LLC Facilitating Market Entry for Global Brands & Investors into UAE & GCC Entrepreneur & Investor | B2B | Investor Relations | Business Consultancy | Strategic Growth | Licensed Merchandise
about:
As a graduate from Heriot-Watt with a passion for entrepreneurship, leadership and innovation, I embarked on an exhilarating journey with R K Enterprise Trading LLC, where I've had the privilege to serve as Operations & Procurement Manager over the past four years under my father's expert tutelage in the retail industry.

Passionate about entrepreneurship and strategic leadership where I lead cross-functional teams in achieving ambitious growth objectives. With a focus on strategic planning, business development, and startup management I thrive in dynamic environments and am adept at driving innovation and operational excellence. 

Looking ahead, I am eager to leverage my entrepreneurial spirit and strategic insights to contribute meaningfully to our organization with the support of our strategic partners.

Our Specialized categories - Dinnerware & Flatware | Drinkware & Crystal Gifting | Cookware & Kitchen Gadgets | Bed & Bath Linen | Furniture & Décor | HORECA | Fashion | Foodstuff | Stocklots | Corporate Gifting | Toys | Smoking requisites.

experience.description:
Leading the development and execution of operational and procurement strategies.
Managed end-to-end procurement worth AED 2.5M+ annually across multiple categories.
Achieved a 12% reduction in procurement costs by renegotiating vendor contracts.
Onboarded and managed relationships with 30+ B2B clients across GCC & Middle East, Africa, Asia, and South America, including Jashanmal, Dubai Duty Free, LMG, Virgin Megastore, ADNOC, Atlantis, Hilton, W Hotel, Sharjah Coop & WH Smith.
Implemented streamlined supply chain processes, improving order fulfillment by 25%.
Led a cross-functional team of 6, enhancing collaboration between logistics and operations
Leading, mentoring, and developing procurement and operations teams.

Specialized categories—Dinnerware & Flatware | Drinkware & Crystal Gifting | Cookware & Kitchen Gadgets | Bed & Bath Linen | Furniture & Décor | HORECA | Fashion | Food & FMCG | Stocklots | Corporate Gifting | Toys.

efficiency.
Work with various teams to streamline workflows and improve
communication.
Help maintain records of operational procedures and compliance standards.
Conduct research to identify the best practices in operations management.

and strategic objectives.

identify opportunities and threats.
Designing and implementing strategic frameworks and action plans that
address business needs.

implementation of new initiatives.

name: Hadee Faiz
headline: Partnerships - Business Analytics - Communications - Global Events and Experiential
about:
I am Hadee Faiz, and I recently completed an MSc in Management from the University of Birmingham. With a passion for business development, strategic planning, and client relationship management, I combine data-driven insights and strategic thinking to foster business growth and build strong relationships. My ability to collaborate with teams and stakeholders has enabled me to deliver in both my academic and my professional journey.

As someone aiming to be a people-centric leader, I build meaningful connections with clients and colleagues. Communication and th English language is the perfect combination of passion to me.

My Bachelor’s degree in Statistics with Actuarial Science and Mathematics from the University of Calicut laid the foundation for me in Data Analysis, Business Analytics, and Strategic decision-making. I expanded these skills with an Advanced Certification in Data Science and AI from IIT Madras, gaining proficiency in AI-driven analytics, predictive modeling, and market analysis.

During my MSc, I developed a strong understanding of Organizational Behavior, Leadership, Operations Management, and Strategic Business Planning. My dissertation on psychometric testing in organizational fit within Singapore’s hiring landscape, in collaboration with professionals from FedEx, National University of Singapore, and IHH Healthcare Singapore, enhanced my knowledge of HR practices, client relations, and data-driven decision-making.

In my professional experience, I’ve applied my skills to roles focused on strategic growth, client engagement, and operational excellence.

I’m eager to apply my skills in Business Development, Strategic Planning, and Client Relationship Management to help organizations achieve their goals and contribute to growth and innovation in a dynamic business environment.

experience.description:
•	Strategic Leadership: Led the marketing department in developing comprehensive strategies aligned with business goals, driving a 35% increase in brand visibility and market share. Spearheaded the development and execution of long-term plans to sustain growth and competitiveness.
	•	Campaign Oversight: Directed the execution of high-impact digital and offline marketing campaigns, increasing efficiency by 25%. Encouraged innovation by exploring new technologies and channels to enhance customer engagement.
	•	Brand Management: Strengthened the company’s brand by ensuring consistent messaging across all platforms, resulting in a 20% improvement in brand recognition.
	•	Budget Management and ROI: Managed the marketing budget to maximize ROI and ensure efficient resource allocation. Developed systems to track success and make data-driven decisions, improving overall campaign return by 15%.
	•	Team Leadership: Led and mentored a cross-functional marketing team, fostering collaboration and aligning individual performance with company objectives, resulting in enhanced team efficiency.
	•	Client and Stakeholder Relations: Collaborated with stakeholders and external partners to maintain relationships, ensuring marketing efforts reflected customer needs, leading to a 30% increase in client satisfaction.
	•	Market Research: Directed market research and competitor analysis to inform decisions, identifying growth opportunities and staying ahead of industry trends.
	•	Digital Transformation: Implemented analytics tools to measure campaign success, resulting in a 22% increase in lead generation. Championed the use of digital tools to optimize efforts across platforms.

•	Campaign Development: Played a key role in conceptualising and executing digital marketing campaigns aimed at prompting community engagement and cultural exchange, leading to a 25% increase in online customer engagement. 
•	Content Creation: Collaborated in a team to craft engaging content for various online platforms including social media and amplified the digital presence and enhanced user interaction by approximately 20%.  
•	Data Analysis: Employed analytics tools to assess the effectiveness of marketing strategies, contributed to data-driven adjustments that increased overall campaign effectiveness by 18%. 
•	Client Engagement: Acted as the primary liaison for community members and stakeholders, integrating their feedback into marketing initiatives, which improved satisfaction rates and participation in hosted events. 
•	Team Collaboration: Engaged actively in weekly brainstorming sessions to improve campaign strategies and operational efficiencies, fostering a proactive and creative work environment.

•	Conducted a dissertation titled “Comprehending the Effectiveness of Psychometric Testing in Organisational Fit within Singapore’s Hiring Landscape.”
	•	Collaborated with top professionals from FedEx, National University of Singapore, and IHH Healthcare Singapore to gain insights into psychometric testing practices.
	•	Investigated the impact of psychometric assessments on hiring and organisational alignment, contributing to the understanding of HR practices in diverse cultural environments.

•	Enhanced production operations and supply chain efficiency through strategic planning, advanced scheduling, and cross functional collaboration, achieving a 15% increase in operational efficiency. 
•	Led a supply chain optimisation project that reduced material waste by 20% and improved throughput with just-in-time inventory practices. 
•	Developed and implemented a custom inventory management system with IT and finance teams, reducing excess inventory by 25% and improving stock turnover by 10%. 
•	Established a quarterly strategic review framework for production operations that maintained high compliance with industry standards and facilitated proactive operational adjustments. 
•	Coordinated cross-functional teams across four departments to improve communication and reduce project delivery timeline by 18%. 
•	Left to pursue masters.

•	Specialised in Health Analytics and Emergency Medicine Strategy, leveraging in-depth patient data analysis to enhance resource allocation, operational efficiency, and patient outcomes. 
•	Developed and implemented data-driven strategies for optimising hospital operations, including patient admissions, discharge processes, and cost reductions. 
•	Led cross-functional teams in daily hospital operations, such as staff coordination, inventory management, and facility maintenance. 
•	Led strategic planning by proving analytical insights for quality improvement, risk mitigation and long-term organisational sustainability. 
•	Presented analytical findings to senior leadership to support evidence-based decision making and enhance patient safety and care quality. 
•	Left due to end of contract.

selected_position.selection_reason: The candidate's experience in strategic planning, client relationship management, and operational excellence make them a strong fit for the operational manager position.

25% increase in efficiency
20% improvement in brand recognition

Your skills and experience make you a strong fit for this role. We would like to invite you for an interview to further discuss your application. I've worked as a test engineer for Infosys. My experience includes test planning, test execution, report preparation, scripting using JMeter & Loadrunner and report analysis. I have used monitoring tools like Grafana, Splunk and AWS cloudwatch.

name: Sajjad Ahammed
headline: Full Stack & GenAI Engineer | React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js | LangChain • RAG • LLM Apps
about:
I’m a Software Engineer with nearly 4 years of experience building modern, scalable full-stack web applications. I specialize in crafting high-performance user interfaces and reliable backend systems using React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and Express.

I focus on clean architecture, performance optimization, reusable components, and seamless API integrations (REST & GraphQL). My workflow also includes MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Docker, CI/CD, Vercel, AWS Amplify, and Firebase, delivering production-ready applications end-to-end.

Recently, I’ve been exploring Generative AI — working with LangChain, vector databases, Hugging Face, and RAG pipelines to build intelligent, context-aware web experiences powered by LLMs.

I enjoy solving real-world problems, contributing to open source, and building impactful products at the intersection of full-stack engineering and AI.

Always open to connecting and discussing modern web development, Next.js architecture, or AI-powered applications.

#React #Nextjs #TypeScript #Nodejs #FullStack #GenAI #LangChain #RAG

education.school: PEEKAY CICS ARTS AND SCIENCE COLLEGE, MATHARA

While their primary professional titles reflect frontend/full-stack development, their explicit skill set and stated interest demonstrate a clear and strong alignment with AI engineering.

name: Adhil A Backer
headline: AI Engineer & Full Stack Engineer | 3+ Years Experience in Python (Django, FastAPI), Golang, Java, and Vue.js | B2B/B2C Startup & Service-Based Company | Experienced in Gen AI, Agentic AI and Stocks | Passionate Hiker
about:
AI-focused Software Engineer who builds production ML, NLP and GenAI systems that move product metrics. At Rapidor I led backend and AI initiatives, architecting an MCP client/server for multi-step LLM workflows and redesigning invoice pipelines (40× faster). At predictores.ai I shipped end-to-end Trend Radar pipelines, optimized async APIs with Redis caching, and developed cultural-intelligence pipelines for multilingual trend forecasting.

Core skills: Python, FastAPI, Go, Vue/TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS/GCP, production LLM integrations.

experience.description:
Junior AI Engineer contributing end-to-end AI and analytics features from data ingestion and model orchestration to production APIs and frontend dashboards to enable trend forecasting and regional cultural analysis.

• Delivered full-stack analytics through the Narrative Radar: Front end, REST APIs, multilingual article ingestion, duplicate detection, trust-scoring, and forecasting pipelines.
• Implemented an end-to-end Trend Radar agentic workflow, developing orchestration logic and diagnostic logging for multi-step reasoning and interactive analysis.
• Optimized the MARE service with asynchronous APIs, Redis-backed caching and intelligent cache-invalidation, reducing latency and improving throughput.
• Built a Cultural Intelligence & Demographic Analysis engine using AWS S3 pipelines, fuzzy region matching, and event-date extraction to support regional cultural forecasting.
• Built LLM-driven RAG workflows into prediction pipelines with evaluation and monitoring systems using RAGAS and Langfuse to ensure business-ready solutions.
• Architected and deployed end-to-end GenAI lifecycles and production-grade AI agents using Azure, Python, FastAPI, OpenAI(GPT-4), TypeScript and Weaviate to deliver predictive intelligence tools

I have worked as a Senior Software Engineer at Rapidor (AcelrTech Labs Pvt Ltd, Kochi, Kerala), a SaaS platform focused on Sales Force Automation. My expertise spans Python (2.7, 3.11), Django (1.8), FastAPI (0.100), Vue.js (2), Go, and PostgreSQL, with growing specialisation in AI and LLM-based systems.  At Rapidor, I have: 

• Lead backend and AI initiatives on Rapidor, a SaaS Sales Force Automation product.
• Architected and shipped MCP (Model Context Protocol) client and server modules to enable multi-step LLM workflows and structured AI-tool integrations across services.
• Redesigned invoice workflows using Vue.js, FastAPI, and Django, delivering a 40x reduction in processing time.
• Built real-time microservices (Go + Apache Pulsar) for low-latency, high-throughput processing and drove a POC for event-driven architectures.
• Implemented Redis caching and performance tuning that improved role-based filtering and overall system responsiveness by ~30%.
• Led GCP migration tasks, automated AWS cloud operations, and provided on-call support for production incidents.
• Mentored junior engineers, conducted code reviews, and guided cross-team technical decisions.  

I also contributed to Place Order — India’s first B2B marketplace on the ONDC platform — developing efficient APIs for product uploads and pin code management using FastAPI and Python 3.12. Additionally, I explored CQRS and Event Sourcing using Go and Apache Pulsar to create reliable event-driven systems for scalable data processing.

• Contributed to 15+ management modules, reports, dashboards, and charts to accelerate data-driven decision-making.
• Developed REST APIs for e-way bill generation and automation scripts that removed manual billing steps.
• Developed APIs for Place Order (India’s first B2B marketplace on ONDC) including product uploads and pin-code management using FastAPI and Python 3.12, cutting manual errors and improving data accuracy.
• Implemented CQRS and Event Sourcing proof-of-concepts in Go to improve scalability and simplify complex data flows.
• Collaborated on cross-functional features, wrote integration tests, and participated in deployment pipelines and release activities.

I have worked as a Back-End developer for Digital FI project in Tata Consultancy Services Kochi, Kerala. We have used Java Spring boot to develop our microservices and I was part of the team for development, testing, deployment and documentation. This helped me to interact with various different technologies.

certifications: Supervised Machine Learning: Regression and Classification
Programming for Everybody (Getting Started with Python)

Dear Adhil A Backer,

I hope this email finds you well.

My name is Lena Babu, and I am a recruiter at Ligenix. I recently reviewed your CV for the AI Engineer position, and I must say, your profile truly stands out.

Your extensive experience as an AI-focused Software Engineer, particularly your work in building production ML, NLP, and GenAI systems, as well as your leadership in backend and AI initiatives at Rapidor and predictores.ai, aligns perfectly with our requirements. name: Kiran Rajan
headline: Data Engineer @ Gritstone Technologies | 4+ Years Exp | GCP (Dataflow, BigQuery, Datastore, Cloud Composer, Pub/Sub) | Python | Apache Beam | Apache Airflow | ETL | SQL
about:
I'm a Data Engineer at Gritstone Technologies, where I craft data solutions using the Google Cloud ecosystem. I develop and deploy data pipelines that transform and load data into BigQuery for visualization using Looker Studio. I also ensure data quality, accessibility, and security by implementing thorough ETL processes and utilizing my proficiency in GCP IAM.

I have a strong background in Machine Learning, having worked as a Machine Learning Engineer for a year, where I built real-world ML applications using Fast and Flask web frameworks, NLP algorithms, and AI-powered chatbots. I hold a B.Tech from SSM College of Engineering and multiple certifications in Python and ML from SoloLearn, Coursera, and HackerRank. 

I'm passionate about technology and innovation, and I'm always eager to learn new skills and explore new possibilities at the intersection of data and AI. I enjoy collaborating with product teams and contributing to business success by optimizing data processing workflows and creating innovative pipelines. I'm looking forward to connecting and exploring opportunities with like-minded professionals.

experience.description:
Specialize in crafting data solutions as a Data Engineer, primarily focusing on developing and deploying data pipelines within the Google Cloud ecosystem. My expertise extends to using key technologies such as Dataflow, Composer (Airflow), Datastore, Cloud Function, Bigquery, and App Engine. I'm dedicated to optimizing data processing workflows and creating innovative pipelines for extensive data transformation, ultimately loading data into BigQuery for visualization using Looker Studio. Additionally, I prioritize ensuring data quality, accessibility, and security by implementing thorough ETL processes and utilizing my proficiency in GCP IAM.

Collaborating closely with product teams is a key aspect of my role, where I work diligently to understand their unique requirements. This in-depth collaboration allows me to design and implement data pipelines that are tailored to their specific needs.

Working as a product engineer responsible for developing and deploying real-world machine learning applications using the Fast and Flask web application framework. Built a video analytics application to extract various parameters such as English proficiency, sentiment, and other metrics to evaluate candidates during interviews. Built AI-powered chatbot.

Design algorithms and write scripts to automate complex data mining, cleaning, and preparation from JSON objects. Build applications using Google Apps Script to automate many tasks in Google Services -Gmail, Google Sheets, etc.
Hired to help over 20+ people to understand their needs and get the job done with rework and technical documentation.

name: Yash Singhal
headline: Software Engineer | GenAI & Backend Developer | Summer Intern @ Reliance Jio | Built Multi-Agent AI Systems | Node.js • Python • RAG • APIs | VIT CSE ’26
about:
I am an AI-focused backend developer specializing in building scalable APIs and production-grade generative AI systems that solve real engineering problems. My work focuses on combining strong backend architecture with modern AI capabilities such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LLM orchestration, and multi-agent systems. I primarily build backend systems using Python, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and REST APIs, and design modular architectures that allow AI components to integrate seamlessly with traditional software infrastructure. My goal when building systems is always the same: automate complex workflows, reduce manual effort, and create reliable developer-friendly platforms that can operate efficiently at scale.

During my internship at Reliance Jio, I designed and deployed a multi-agent GenAI assistant for telecom APIs that significantly improved developer productivity. The system integrated RAG search, OpenAPI schema parsing, and code generation tools into a modular orchestration pipeline built using Langflow. This architecture enabled engineers to resolve complex API queries in under a minute instead of spending hours searching documentation. I also implemented observability and debugging workflows using Langfuse, allowing faster troubleshooting and system monitoring. Through architectural improvements and efficient LLM orchestration, the system achieved a 35% improvement in throughput and reduced response latency by 25%, while maintaining reliable outputs for telecom engineers and product teams.

Beyond industry work, I build production-style projects that focus on backend performance, automation, and data-driven systems. I developed a Personal Finance Tracker with a secure RESTful backend using Node.js, Express.js, and PostgreSQL, implementing authentication, automated budget alerts, and financial analytics dashboards. I also built an SQL Query Optimizer that analyzes and rewrites inefficient queries using rule-based optimization techniques, reducing execution costs and eliminating common SQL anti-patterns. I am particularly interested in backend engineering roles where software systems intersect with AI infrastructure, developer platforms, and automation tools, and where scalable architecture and intelligent systems can be used to solve complex real-world problems.
certifications: Generative AI with Large Language Models
HTML, CSS and Javascript for Web Developers

selected_position.selection_reason: Yash Singhal's CV demonstrates a strong focus and practical experience in generative AI and backend development, directly aligning with the requirements for an AI Engineer. His internship at Reliance Jio involved designing and deploying a multi-agent GenAI assistant using RAG, LLM orchestration, and modern MLOps practices, delivering significant quantifiable improvements. His technical skills in Python, Node.js, RAG, and API development are highly relevant, and his stated interest perfectly matches the intersection of software systems and AI infrastructure.

key_achievements: Designed and deployed a multi-agent GenAI assistant for telecom APIs at Reliance Jio, integrating RAG search, OpenAPI schema parsing, and code generation.
Improved developer productivity, enabling engineers to resolve complex API queries in under a minute.
Achieved a 35% improvement in throughput and reduced response latency by 25% for the GenAI system through architectural improvements and efficient LLM orchestration.
Implemented observability and debugging workflows using Langfuse for faster troubleshooting and system monitoring.
Developed a Personal Finance Tracker with a secure RESTful backend, including authentication, automated budget alerts, and financial analytics.
Built an SQL Query Optimizer that analyzes and rewrites inefficient queries using rule-based optimization techniques.
summary.overall_summary: Yash Singhal is an exceptionally promising early-career professional with a strong foundation in Computer Science and specialized experience in generative AI and backend development. His internship at Reliance Jio provided hands-on experience in building and deploying production-grade AI systems, demonstrating a clear understanding of LLM orchestration, RAG, and MLOps. Combined with robust personal projects and a keen interest in the intersection of software systems and AI infrastructure, Yash is an excellent candidate for the AI Engineer position, showcasing both technical depth and a drive for impactful problem-solving.

about:
Machine Learning Enthusiast  Aspiring Researcher  AI & Data Science Innovator
With a strong foundation in AI and Machine Learning, I am passionate about applying data-driven solutions to complex challenges. Currently pursuing a BE in Computer Science with AI & ML at Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology, I have developed expertise in deep learning, predictive analytics, and computer vision through academic coursework, hands-on projects, and industry internships.

My projects in gesture-based human-computer interaction and proctored examination cheating detection showcase my commitment to leveraging AI for practical and impactful solutions.
At Corizo, I worked on stock market prediction and wine quality assessment using machine learning techniques. Additionally, my internship at Gowatr Pvt Ltd strengthened my skills in front-end development, data processing, and analytics, expanding my understanding of AI applications across diverse industries.
Proficient in Python, C, C++, and experienced with TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch, I specialize in CNN, CRNN, RNN, along with data analysis and visualization using Scikit-learn, Matplotlib, and Seaborn. I actively contribute to projects that bridge AI and real-world challenges.
I competed in Smart India Hackathon 2023, addressing challenges in legal awareness with AI, and have published research in the IC-ITECHS Journal on AI-driven solutions. I am continuously refining my skills to contribute to advancements in AI and machine learning.

I collaborated closely with marketing, product, and content teams to deliver visuals aligned with business goals, while managing multiple design projects under tight deadlines to ensure high-quality and timely output

I was responsible for developing branding materials, logos, and advertising creatives for various client campaigns across both digital and print platforms. I worked on maintaining a consistent visual identity across all designs and communication touchpoints, ensuring brand alignment and quality in every project.

selected_position.selection_reason: Sujitha S is an ideal candidate for the graphic designer position, possessing direct and relevant experience in both print and digital graphic design. Her extensive skills in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, and UI/UX, combined with a proven track record of creating brand-consistent materials and collaborating with marketing teams, align perfectly with the role's requirements. Her 'About' section and 'Experience' descriptions directly address the needs of a professional graphic designer.

key_achievements: Designed print-ready marketing materials including brochures, packaging, banners, and billboards using Adobe Creative Suite.
Created responsive digital assets for social media, websites, email campaigns, and online ads, maintaining strong brand consistency and user engagement.
Collaborated closely with marketing, product, and content teams to deliver visuals aligned with business goals.
Managed multiple design projects under tight deadlines to ensure high-quality and timely output.
Developed branding materials, logos, and advertising creatives for various client campaigns across digital and print platforms.
Maintained a consistent visual identity across all designs and communication touchpoints, ensuring brand alignment and quality.
summary.overall_summary: Sujitha S is a highly qualified candidate for the Graphic Designer position, bringing 2.75 years of focused experience in a range of graphic design responsibilities. Her proficiency in key industry tools like the Adobe Creative Suite and Figma is exceptional. She has a strong background in both print and digital design, branding, and cross-functional team collaboration, demonstrating an ability to manage projects and deliver impactful, brand-aligned creative solutions. While her education is in an unrelated field, her extensive professional experience in graphic design strongly positions her as a professional ready to contribute from day one.
summary.draft_mail:
Subject: Your Application for Graphic Designer Position at RECAP

Dear Sujitha S,

We are delighted to inform you that your application for the Graphic Designer position at RECAP has been thoroughly reviewed, and we are very impressed with your qualifications and experience.

Your expertise in branding, print, and digital design, along with your proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite and Figma, aligns perfectly with the requirements of our team. Your experience in creating diverse marketing materials and collaborating with cross-functional teams is particularly noteworthy.

We would like to invite you for an interview to discuss your experience further and learn more about how you can contribute to RECAP. Please expect a separate communication from our recruitment team shortly to schedule this.

Thank you again for your interest in RECAP. We look forward to speaking with you.

Sincerely,

Lena Babu
Recruiter
RECAP
